name: Cosmic API
author: Cosmic
description: Windows Roblox executor backend. When enabled, the Attach button injects via Cosmic and scripts execute through it.

options.name: Auto-inject new instances
options.description: Automatically inject Cosmic into new Roblox processes as they launch.

options.name: Unlock FPS
options.description: Remove the Roblox FPS cap on injected instances.
